title: Dell India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dell India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
